title: RMS International Mega Snowman Christmas Craft Jar Festive Tissue Paper Beads Glitter & More Art Card Making Set Adults 3+ Kids Gift
features: JAM-PACKED FESTIVE FUN: Our Mega Snowman Christmas Craft Jar is a treasure trove of creative goodies, ensuring you have everything you need for your holiday crafts. Say goodbye to the hassle of hunting down supplies, as this jar has it all.

UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY: Inside this festive snowman jar, you'll discover a world of possibilities. Let your artistic flair shine with a range of materials, including shredded paper, craft tissue, zig-zag scissors, foam letters, numbers, pom poms, sequins, beads, googly eyes, glitter pom poms, foam shapes, lollipop sticks, and coloured paper. The only limit is your imagination!

STYLISH HOME DECOR: Beyond its creative potential, this charming snowman jar serves as a delightful piece of holiday home decor. Place it on your kitchen counter or shelf, and watch it spread the holiday cheer with its adorable design.

VERSATILE HOLIDAY CRAFTING: Whether you're crafting Christmas cards, crafting unique decorations, or creating heartfelt gifts, this craft jar is your go-to companion. It's perfect for a wide range of festive projects, making your holiday season more joyful and memorable.

ADULTS AND KIDS: This kit is perfect for children over 3+ to ready them and create décor for the festive period, its also handy for adults as the craft bits will surely come in use for when it’s time to put up your lovely decoration around the house.

CONTENTS: Shredded paper, 1 x roll of craft tissue, 1 x zig zag scissors, bag of assorted foam letters & numbers, bag of small pom pom's, bag of sequins & beads, bag of googly eyes, bag of glitter pom pom's, bag of foam shapes, 10 x lollipop sticks and 5 x sheets of coloured paper.
description: Add a sprinkle of festive magic to your holiday crafts with our Mega Snowman Christmas Craft Jar! This jolly giant snowman jar is your one-stop solution for all your creative Christmas endeavours. Bursting with an array of high-quality arts and crafts materials, this jar is designed to ignite your imagination and elevate your holiday projects. Get ready to immerse yourself in the spirit of the season with our Mega Snowman Christmas Craft Jar. Elevate your crafting experience, create lasting memories, and bring the magic of the holidays into your home.
